title: cymbalaria elatine
intro: Cymbalaria elatine, also known as greater ivy-leaved toadflax, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cymbalaria elatine are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Cymbalaria elatine can be prepared as an herbal tea or used in tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in infusions for medicinal purposes.
